title: find_thematic_parallel data payload
description: Random-Indexing distributional semantic embeddings (Sahlgren 2005) over the eBL 28,665-tablet sign corpus. Returns top-K cosine-similar tablets per seed. 300-dim, ±3 window, k=8 nonzeros, mean-centered (Mu & Viswanath 2018 lite). Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

tablet_id.description: Museum number of the seed tablet.

neighbors.description: Top-K thematic neighbors ranked by cosine similarity (descending). Empty if the seed is not in the embedding index.

id.description: Museum number of the neighbor tablet.

score.description: Cosine similarity. Mean-centered, so ~0 = unrelated, > 0.5 = clearly thematic siblings, < 0 = anti-correlated distributional profile.

vocab_size.description: Distinct signs in the embedding vocab after MIN_SIGN_FREQ filter.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the embedding index was built. Null if not loaded.

warnings.description: Truncations, fallback paths, or missing-index notes. Empty when the seed was found and matched the filter.
